description: Project-specific code review red lines and enforcement guidance.

red_lines.title: Log Security Leak
red_lines.trigger: Logging complete sender, tab, request objects, raw HTML, or unsanitized sensitive content.
red_lines.enforcement: Reject PR. Allow IDs only. Sanitize URLs and API errors.

red_lines.title: Storage Quota Violation
red_lines.trigger: Storing large HTML, Base64 images, or heavy payloads in chrome.storage.sync.
red_lines.enforcement: Reject PR. Store large payloads in chrome.storage.local or IndexedDB.

red_lines.title: Test Coverage Regression
red_lines.trigger: Adding core business logic without corresponding unit or E2E coverage.
red_lines.enforcement: Reject PR. Require tests and preserve coverage gates.

red_lines.title: Unverified Severity Claim
red_lines.trigger: Marking an issue as CRITICAL or security-related without source lines and a concrete reproduction scenario.
red_lines.enforcement: Require re-verification and downgrade if evidence is insufficient.

red_lines.title: Leaked Internal Error
red_lines.trigger: Surfacing internal-only, non-actionable cleanup, reconciliation, or retry failures directly to users.
red_lines.enforcement: Keep canonical user-facing state. Handle retry or recovery internally.

red_lines.title: Complexity-Inflating Non-Issue
red_lines.trigger: Escalating low-risk, self-recovering state hygiene issues into must-fix findings that mainly add branching or coupling.
red_lines.enforcement: Re-evaluate user impact and downgrade to acceptable tech debt when appropriate.

red_lines.title: Registry Dead Code
red_lines.trigger: Adding or keeping runtime action registry entries with no actual usage side in scripts/ or options/.
red_lines.enforcement: Require actual usage in the same PR or remove the entry. Run runtimeActions coverage tests.

red_lines.title: Missing Usage Side for New Action
red_lines.trigger: Adding a runtime action without any matching sendMessage or handler registration in the same PR.
red_lines.enforcement: Require action definition and usage to land together.
